title: wenzelia tenuifolia
intro: Wenzelia tenuifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved wenzelia, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to the Philippines. The medicinal properties of Wenzelia tenuifolia are attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds like limonene and beta-pinene, exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Wenzelia tenuifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
